response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document is dated March 2026 (a future date), cites a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques" (the EDPB did not exist until 2018), and takes a legally radical position—that pseudonymized data is outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—directly contradicting GDPR Recital 26 and established EDPB doctrine, with no corroborating trace of such guidance existing.
